articles.author: Ellen Francis
articles.title: Hungary blocks Europe’s aid for Ukraine on war’s fourth anniversary - The Washington Post
articles.description: Hungary’s veto over European funding could constrain Ukraine’s ability to fund its army and weaken its hand in U.S. talks with Russia over the war.
articles.content: BRUSSELS Hungary is holding up about $105 billion in European funding for Ukraine, a roadblock for Kyiv as top E.U. leaders traveled to the war-torncountry Tuesday to mark the fourth anniversary of R… [+15 chars]
